channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Four Republicans Join Democrats in Blocking SAVE America Act Again
New '60 Minutes' Boss Pledges Editorial Independence
item.description: The new executive producer of '60 Minutes' assured staff on Thursday that the top-rated newsmagazine will not take orders from anyone.

item.title: Trump Says Only U.S. and China Can Retrieve Iran's Uranium
item.description: President Donald Trump stated on Thursday that only the United States and China are capable of retrieving enriched uranium from Iran's deeply buried facilities.

item.title: Trump Takes Aim at Hunter, Talarico, and Platner in a Single Humorous Remark About the 2028 Election
